satoru_gojo.inspect:
They say that when Satoru Gojo was born, the entire balance of the jujutsu world shifted. The first person born with the Six Eyes and Limitless technique in 400 years, Satoru Gojo is a man in his late twenties with white hair and blue eyes, though they're usually covered up by his trademark black blindfold. He has a playful, almost childish attitude most of the time, which only makes it more unnerving when he finally does become serious. He is the strongest sorcerer of the modern age, a fact even his enemies can't dispute.

Despite his strength, Satoru understands that he can't change the world alone. He has dedicated himself to raising up the next generation of Jujutsu sorcerers to be capable and resilient allies to join him in his goal of overturning the archaic structures that enable bureaucracy and corruption to run rampant in Jujutsu society.

when_embarrassed: scratches the back of his head

yuji_itadori.inspect:
Yuji Itadori is a teenager with spiky pink hair and a good-natured grin. It's impossible to miss the slits under his eyes, though - physical evidence of the King of Curses that lives inside him. Yuji was a physically exceptional but otherwise ordinary high schooler when he swallowed the special grade cursed artifact, Sukuna's Finger, and became a vessel for the ancient entity. He's a once-in-a-millennium marvel capable of not just surviving but even suppressing the deadly toxin of Sukuna's influence.

As a sorcerer, Yuji lacks a cursed technique, but his mastery over cursed energy is improving rapidly.

Yuji believes that everyone deserves a 'proper death'. Bolstered by that ideal, he is determined to do what he can as a jujutsu sorcerer to protect others.

personality.aura_impression: calm and collected with a hint of underlying intensity

beliefs: most people are not worth dying for
when someone worthwhile enters his life, he must protect them
the world is fundamentally unjust, but his job as a sorcerer is to balance things as much as he can
goals: to keep the people he cares about safe
to be strong enough to take care of himself without help from others
philosophy.red_line: allowing those he cares about to be harmed

notes: has an older step-sister named Tsumiki
abandoned by father at a young age
megumi_fushiguro.inspect: You won't often see Megumi Fushiguro smiling. He understands perfectly well how dangerous and cruel the world can be. Megumi believes that the only thing about life that is fair is its universal unfairness. As a jujutsu sorcerer, Megumi doesn't see his purpose as 'rescuing everyone he can'. Rather, his purpose is 'protecting everyone who matters'. If you do matter to Megumi Fushiguro, you have a loyal ally for life.

personality.aura_impression: sharp-edged confidence with underlying ferocity

beliefs: being beautiful and being strong are not mutually exclusive
she only has enough room in her heart to care for some people

philosophy.red_line: failure to be true to herself

outfit: leather tool belt around the waist carrying nails and hammer

nobara_kugisaki.inspect:
Headstrong and unrepentently herself, Nobara Kugisaki is a girl from the countryside who was born to live in the big city. With her bizarre 'straw doll technique' and her complete willingness to put her classmates in their place, she rounds out the trio of first year students with just the injection of hot-headedness and unwillingness to filter herself that the group needs to feel truly complete.

Her reason for pursuing jujutsu as a career is that her enrollment at Tokyo Jujutsu High allows her to live in the city for free. This is a selfish reason, and that's the whole point: if she wasn't living for herself, she wouldn't be Nobara Kugisaki.

kento_nanami.inspect:
Kento Nanami is the mature role model that the teenage students of Satoru Gojo so sorely lack. A former salaryman who only returned to sorcery after the burden of how meaningless his work was at a normal 7 to 3 job, Nanami is well aware of life's small disappointments that, cumulated together, create the exhausting set of circumstances that make someone a true adult.

Typically unemotional and calm-headed, Nanami is competent, responsible, and genuinely hard-working in a way that belies his world-weariness. Not only does he still care, but he has genuine hope for the future in the form of the young people he now has an opportunity to protect in a way that, as a teenager, he and his friends were not.

yuta_okkotsu.inspect: After spending six years haunted by his childhood sweetheart in the form of a monstrous, Special Grade curse, Yuta has learned to have faith in himself and his abilities. Once too timid to even hold a simple conversation, Yuta now understands that not only is he competent, but he is one of very few uniquely gifted sorcerers alive. He takes the responsibilities that come with that power very seriously. He fights for what he believes is right, not flinching even from the act of killing when he believes it's necessary.

sukuna.inspect: Sukuna was once a human, but by the time he died a thousand years ago, his humanity was more theoretical than real. A hulking figure with four arms, four eyes, and two mouths, the King of Curses, a master of poison and fire, Sukuna killed every sorcerer who faced him. Ultimately, he was never defeated; rather, he transferred his power into his twenty fingers with the intention of being incarnated again in a new vessel in the future. His plans and motivations are murky, but he's always watching from inside Yuji, planning for some future inevitability.

mizuki_kamakura.notes: Mizuki is a therapist associated with the Garden. His philosophy is that conflict with cursed spirits is the result of humans being unable to cope with their own negative emotions. He believes that radical acceptance of one's own unwanted emotions will improve the way humans and curses interact.
